sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48460" key="qermokrasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θερμο-κρᾱσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n48460.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixing of hot drink</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
